scripts.test: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/context-kit/*.test.ts "$ext"/lsp/__tests__/lsp.test.mjs'
scripts.test:context-kit: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/context-kit/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:lsp: sh -c 'ext=$([ -d exact_extensions ] && echo exact_extensions || echo extensions); node --experimental-strip-types --test "$ext"/lsp/__tests__/lsp.test.mjs'
